case_title: IN RE: STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES
cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (certificate of facts to initiate contempt proceedings under government code section 11455.20(a))

docket_entries.description: ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS: CHEW, JONAH ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR CHOW, WILLIAM
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-21-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WILLIAM CHOW'S NOTICE OF PETITION FOR CERTIFICATION OF FACTS TO INITIATE CONTEMPT PROCEEDINGS UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 11455.20(A). ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY RESPONDENT. -- AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - PETITION TO INITIATE CONTEMPT IS DENIED. THE PURPOSE OF A SECTION 11525 CONTEMPT PROCEEDING IS TO MAINTAIN THE DIGNITY OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE TRIBUNAL AND TO ENFORCE ITS ORDERS AND CAN ONLY BE BROUGHT BY THE AGENCY, NOT A PARTY TO THE ADMINISTRATIVE HEARING. PARRIS V. ZOLLIN (1996) 12 CAL.4TH 839. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Certification Of Facts To Initiate Contempt Proceedings Under Gvt. Code Section 11455.20(A)
Off Calendar Jul-21-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER WILLIAM CHOW'S NOTICE OF PETITION FOR CERTIFICATION OF FACTS TO INITIATE CONTEMPT PROCEEDINGS UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 11455.20(a).

APPEARANCES: Jonah Chew, Esq. 484-1718 for petitioner & moving party; Bradley A. Russi, Deputy City Atty 554-3964 for respondent & opposing party.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Proposed order submitted by respondent.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted - PETITION TO INITIATE CONTEMPT IS DENIED. THE PURPOSE OF A SECTION 11525 CONTEMPT PROCEEDING IS TO MAINTAIN THE DIGNITY OF THE ADMINISTRATIVE TRIBUNAL AND TO ENFORCE ITS ORDERS AND CAN ONLY BE BROUGHT BY THE AGENCY, NOT A PARTY TO THE ADMINISTRATIVE HEARING. PARRIS V. ZOLLIN (1996) 12 CAL.4TH 839. Order signed. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Petition For Certification Of Facts To Initiate Contempt Proceedings Under Gvt. Code Section 11455.20(A)
Off Calendar Jun-29-2011 Continued To Jul-21-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER WILLIAM CHOW'S PETITION FOR CERTIFICATION OF FACTS TO INITIATE CONTEMPT PROCEEDINGS UNDER GVT. CODE SECTION 11455.20(A).
Appearances: Bradley A. Russi of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3964) for the San Francisco Medical Examiner; Abigail A. Rivamonte (484.1718) for petitioner and moving party.
Discussed and the court granted the City's request to continue. The court set forth the following briefing schedule: hearing continued to July 21, 2011, any opposition to be filed by July 6, 2011, petitioner's reply to be filed by July 12, 2011. Petitioner to submit a billing outline. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Petition For Certification Of Facts To Initiate Contempt Proceedings Under Gvt. Code Section 11455.20(A)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
